pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace Debian-based apt-get package installation with Alpine's apk package manager.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Install bash explicitly via apk to support shell scripts and nvm installation.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Explicitly define the Storybook framework as react-webpack5, which is required for newer Storybook versions.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Migrate from Jest 26 (using jest-jasmine2) to Jest 29, which requires removing the legacy jasmine2 adapter and updating all related dependencies.
frontend/package-lock.json.human_impl: Removed jest-jasmine2, jest-resolve, jest-runtime, and other Jest 26 internals; added new dependencies like @jest/core, jest-circus, and updated peer dependencies.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Update react-scripts to a version compatible with the new Jest and Node versions, likely moving from v4/v5 to v5+ or a newer minor version.
frontend/package-lock.json.human_impl: Dependencies like webpack-dev-server, html-webpack-plugin, and workbox-webpack-plugin were updated to versions compatible with the new react-scripts.
